verses.text: Topa aw, nang kong sam hi; hong kinawh in. Nang kong sap ciangin ka aw hong ngai in
Ka thungetna pen na mai-ah paknamtui bangsak in la, ka khutte ka laptohna pen nitak biakpiakna bangsak in
Topa aw, keima kam a cing ding khat koih in la, ka mukte' kongkhak a vil ding khat koih in
Mawh bawlnopna lungsim hong neisak kei in la, a gilo mite tawh hong kikhawlsak kei in. Amau' anlimte hong duhgawh sak kei ta in
Miphapa kei hong vuasak in la, ahih hangin migilote ka lu sathau nilhsak kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gitloh gamtatnate nakpi takin langpangin thu ka ngenngen hi
Amaute, thu kisitin mawhsakna a thuak uh ciangin, Topa' thute man hi, ci-in a thei ding uh hi
Mi khat in suangpi khat sukhamin leitungah a thehthang gawp bangin Leinuai' kongvangah amau' guhte kithehthang hi
Ahih hangin Topa Pasian aw, nang ka hong muang tawntung a, nangmah ka hong bel hi. Tua ahih manin kei hong nusia kei in
Amaute in kei hong siahna uh tehlop leh siatna bawlte' thangzak panin kei hong kem in
Kei ka suahtak khit ciangin amau' ngenthang sung mahah migilote awksak in.
